heading: Payments; adjustments; advances or reimbursement; installments
label: 2000c–5 Payments; adjustments; advances or reimbursement; installments
text: Payments pursuant to a grant or contract under this subchapter may be made (after necessary adjustments on account of previously made overpayments or underpayments) in advance or by way of reimbursement, and in such installments, as the Secretary may determine.
notes: Transfer of Functions“Secretary”, meaning the Secretary of Education, substituted in text for “Commissioner” pursuant to sections 301(a)(1) and 507 of , which are classified to sections 3441(a)(1) and 3507 of Title 20, Education, and which transferred all functions of Commissioner of Education to Secretary of Education.Pub. L. 96–88
